MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joel Blanchet, Esq., counsel for defendant and moving party, Wind Point Partners:
Page Barnes, Esq., counsel for plaintiff, Northpoint Theater:

The court adopted the tentative ruling set forth herein.
Re intentional misrepresentation: sustained with leave to amend to plead with specificity facts re misrepresentation, who, what, where, when.
Re: negligent misrepresentation: sustained without leave to amend.
Otherwise, overruled. 10 days leave to convorm to ruling.
